title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 513.465 - No property exempt from sale for taxes
text:
513.465.  No property exempt from sale for taxes. — Nothing contained in this chapter shall be construed so as to exempt any property from seizure and sale for the payment of taxes due this state, or any city, town or county thereof.
(RSMo 1939 § 1330) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1166; 1919 § 1617; 1909 § 2186
